rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks inside component type or implementation annexes based on the current target component type
Use 'assume' for input assumptions and 'guarantee' for output guarantees in component type annexes
Use 'assign' for implementation-level bindings in component implementation annexes
Place input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees only when concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations are available
generic_rules: Use exact current-case names from the model index for all identifiers
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants
Treat each annex agree block as scoped to its owning component declaration
For implementation contracts, use assign only when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use 'assume "label": expression;' and 'guarantee "label": expression;' syntax for component type contracts
Use 'assign output = expression;' syntax for implementation-level bindings
Use 'eq name : type = expression;' and 'const name : type = value;' syntax for equations and constants
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
Do not copy identifiers from examples or invent ports/components
